notes: survive_coef=0.3 mostly crashes (4/5 at ~0.85s) but one outlier at 4.64s — first intermediate flight time in the bracket. Training bimodal throughout (18.10 ± 9.66, sawtooth 5→28). Phase transition confirmed sharp between 0.3-0.5. The 4.64s outlier suggests 0.3 is RIGHT at the edge — the deterministic mean policy is unstable but occasionally survives longer. 0 gates in all runs. Bracket complete: 0.5=hover, 0.3=crash(edge), 0.15=crash, 0.0=crash. Reward tuning alone cannot solve hover-or-crash.
